_comments_global: GLOBAL MCP SETTINGS (Optional). Put these inside your settings.json or ~/.gemini.json at the top level 'mcp' object. Leave empty or omitted if not needed.
_comments_servers: SERVER CONFIGURATIONS. Put these inside your settings.json or ~/.gemini.json under 'mcpServers'. Below are comprehensive examples.
